text.title: Product Launch Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Product Launch end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: pre-launch
step.action: Build assets, brief support, arm monitors, dry-run announcement.

step.name: launch-day
step.action: Release, announce per-segment cadence, watch monitors live.

step.name: first-72h
step.action: Stand-by for incident response; respond to feedback queue.

step.name: post-launch-review
step.action: Compare to success thresholds; emit scale / hold / rollback decision.
